parameters.query:
-- Create the main audit record
INSERT INTO speed_audits (
  audit_date,
  avg_pagespeed_mobile,
  avg_pagespeed_desktop,
  avg_lcp_ms,
  avg_cls,
  avg_fcp_ms,
  avg_ttfb_ms,
  avg_speed_index,
  critical_issues,
  high_issues,
  medium_issues,
  low_issues,
  page_results,
  status
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.audit_date }}'::date,
  {{ $json.avg_pagespeed_mobile || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.avg_pagespeed_desktop || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.avg_lcp_ms || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.avg_cls || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.avg_fcp_ms || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.avg_ttfb_ms || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.avg_speed_index || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.critical_issues }},
  {{ $json.high_issues }},
  {{ $json.medium_issues }},
  {{ $json.low_issues }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.page_results) }}'::jsonb,
  'pending'
)
RETURNING id;

SELECT 
  sa.*,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speed_audit_items WHERE audit_id = sa.id) as item_count
FROM speed_audits sa
WHERE sa.id = '{{ $('Insert Audit Record').first().json.id }}';
UPDATE speed_audits SET slack_sent_at = NOW(), email_sent_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $('Generate Notifications').first().json.audit_id }}';
